reasoning.A:

This has produced a flawless Round 1 escape every single time. No reason to deviate from a proven winning equilibrium.

The expected value overwhelmingly favors immediate volunteering: tiny risk of arithmetic error vs. 25% random death risk if no one volunteers. Same winning strategy, same bold action.
